title: dussia micranthera
intro: Dussia micranthera, also known as the "False Bird's Eye" plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dussia micranthera include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Dussia micranthera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
